seo.title: UrMedz — Authentic Medicines at Your Fingertips
seo.description: UrMedz is a pharmacy and health-tech network — retail stores, quick commerce and hi-tech fulfilment centres bringing authentic medicines to your doorstep.

slides.alt: UrMedz — Authentic medicines at your fingertips

data.title: Medicines are indispensable to our lives. Accessibility and affordability can be game changing.
data.description: The pharma sector is experiencing a much needed transformation. Access to a large range of options brings choice and affordability to your doorstep.

features.title: 50,000 sft Fulfilment Centres. Widest array of medicines.

items.title: Retail Stores
items.description: A network of 25 stores and counting — neighbourhood pharmacies stocked with authentic medicines.

items.title: Quick Commerce
items.description: India's largest network of dark stores in pharma — same-day and on-demand delivery.

items.title: Hi-Tech Fulfilment
items.description: India's most advanced fulfilment centres in pharmaceutical distribution.

items.title: E-commerce Fulfilment
items.description: India's largest pharmaceutical fulfilment partner in e-commerce.

data.title: Unraveling the magic of brand options in medicines
data.description: Prices of medicines vary dramatically from brand to brand. However the medicine's composition remains identical across brands. The UrMedz intelligent engine presents optimised options for you.
data.statsSubtitle: From prescribed brand to UrMedz recommendation

data.marquee: Authentic · Traceable · Compliant · Fast · Scalable · Trusted

data.title: Proud to be powered by a dedicated team
data.description: Our doctors, pharmacists, supply chain specialists and health guardians are dedicated to delivering authentic healthcare products — managing everything from customer support to quality assurance with care and commitment.
data.centralText: United by a single purpose — to make healthcare accessible, affordable, and trustworthy for everyone.

items.title: Authenticity at the source
items.description: Every medicine on our shelves is sourced from licensed distributors and traceable to its manufacturer — no grey-market shortcuts.

items.title: Scale where it matters
items.description: A retail-plus-fulfilment footprint means the medicine you need is rarely more than a few kilometres away.

items.title: Infrastructure built for compliance
items.description: Cold-chain handling, batch traceability and audit-ready dispatch — built into every store and centre.

items.title: An AI-assisted platform
items.description: Our SaaS platform helps partner pharmacies forecast demand, manage inventory and stay compliant — quietly, in the background.

steps.title: Browse or upload your prescription
steps.description: Search our catalogue or upload a doctor's prescription — we'll match it to authentic, in-stock medicines.

steps.title: A licensed pharmacist reviews it
steps.description: Every order is checked by a registered pharmacist before it's dispensed — interactions, dosage and validity.

steps.title: Delivered or ready for pickup
steps.description: Choose home delivery from your nearest UrMedz store, or pick it up on your way — usually within hours.

items.quote: Knowing that every strip I pick up is genuine — and that a real pharmacist has looked at the prescription — is the part I'd been missing for years.
items.name: Anika Rao

items.quote: We moved our store onto the UrMedz platform and inventory finally stopped being a guessing game. The forecasting alone paid for itself in a quarter.
items.name: Rohit Menon

items.quote: What stands out is the discipline — temperature logs, batch numbers, dispatch trails. It feels less like a pharmacy chain and more like infrastructure.
items.name: Dr. Priya Iyer

items.question: Where do you source your medicines from?
items.answer: All medicines on the UrMedz network are sourced from licensed distributors and authorised manufacturer channels. Every batch is traceable end to end, and our stores and fulfilment centres are audited against regulatory standards.

items.question: How do you handle prescriptions?
items.answer: Prescription-only medicines require a valid doctor's prescription. You can upload it through our app or hand it in at any UrMedz store. A registered pharmacist reviews every prescription before the order is dispensed.

items.question: Which areas do you deliver to?
items.answer: Quick commerce delivery is available across Bengaluru and Hyderabad today, with same-day or next-day delivery in several other cities. You can check live coverage for your pin code on the UrMedz app.

items.question: What is your return policy?
items.answer: Medicines can be returned only in line with regulatory guidelines — typically unopened items in original packaging, returned within seven days, with a valid invoice. Cold-chain and prescription-controlled items are non-returnable for safety reasons.

items.question: How can I get in touch?
items.answer: You can reach our support team via the contact page, walk in to any UrMedz retail store, or call our customer care line for help with an order, a prescription, or a partnership query.

compliance.disclaimer: UrMedz is an informational platform connecting customers with licensed pharmacies and partner clinicians. The content on this website is intended for general awareness only and is not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis, advice or treatment. Always consult a qualified medical practitioner for any health concern. Prescription medicines are dispensed by licensed pharmacies in accordance with applicable regulations and only against a valid prescription.
